content: Search for any events (like war, inflation, FED) or commodity prices that could affect Vestas' valuation. Use the Polymarket to create a chain of probabilities, then provide a final risk assessment.

args.thought: Planning the probability chain for Vestas risk assessment. Key macro/commodity factors affecting VWS: 1) Fed rates (project financing costs), 2) US/EU recession (wind project demand), 3) Trade/tariffs (China, IRA/WTO), 4) Geopolitical conflicts (energy security), 5) Steel/copper prices (turbine input costs), 6) Oil prices (energy transition urgency). I need to search Polymarket for each category and build a weighted probability chain.

data.result:
Polymarket — prediction market probabilities for: "Fed rate cut"
(Prices reflect crowd-sourced odds from real-money traders)

▸ Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the April 2026 meeting?
    Yes: 0.4%
    No: 99.6%
    expires 2026-04-29 · 24h vol $883K · liquidity $1.3M

▸ Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the April 2026 meeting?
    Yes: 96.7%
    No: 3.4%
    expires 2026-04-29 · 24h vol $542K · liquidity $755K

▸ Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25+ bps after the April 2026 meeting?
    Yes: 1.8%
    No: 98.2%
    expires 2026-04-29 · 24h vol $273K · liquidity $467K

▸ Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 25 bps after the April 2026 meeting?
    Yes: 1.1%
    No: 99.0%
    expires 2026-04-29 · 24h vol $233K · liquidity $693K

▸ Will the upper bound of the target federal funds rate be ≥ 4.5% at the end of 2026?
    Yes: 3.0%
    No: 97.0%
    expires 2026-12-09 · 24h vol $641K · liquidity $17K

Source: polymarket.com — probabilities are market-implied, not guaranteed.
